Foshan Haitian Flavouring and Food Company Ltd. Class H ( (HK:3288) ) just unveiled an announcement.

Foshan Haitian Flavouring and Food Company Ltd., a leading Chinese flavouring and food producer listed in Hong Kong, has released its unaudited first quarterly report for 2026 prepared under China Accounting Standards for Business Enterprises. The board, senior management and accounting officers collectively guarantee the truthfulness, accuracy and completeness of the disclosed financial information and accept joint and several legal liability for any misstatements.

The announcement, made under Hong Kong listing and securities regulations, confirms that the report is treated as inside information and that the 2026 first-quarter figures have not undergone an external audit. The disclosure underscores the company’s compliance with Hong Kong’s governance standards and signals transparency to investors ahead of any further detailed financial analysis or audited results later in the year.

More about Foshan Haitian Flavouring and Food Company Ltd. Class H

Foshan Haitian Flavouring and Food Company Ltd. is a PRC-incorporated joint stock company listed in Hong Kong that operates in the food and condiments industry. The group focuses on flavouring and food products, and its H-share listing on the Stock Exchange of Hong Kong positions it to tap international capital markets while serving mainly the Chinese consumer market.

data.title: CSPC Innovation Posts Strong Revenue Growth but Wider Losses in Q1 2026
data.description:
Claim 55% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

CSPC Pharmaceutical Group ( (HK:1093) ) has issued an announcement.

CSPC Pharmaceutical Group has disclosed unaudited first-quarter 2026 financial data for its Shenzhen-listed subsidiary, CSPC Innovation Pharmaceutical, prepared under China Accounting Standards. The company stressed that the figures relate only to the subsidiary, are unaudited and consolidated, and urged shareholders and potential investors to exercise caution when trading its securities.

For the three months ended 31 March 2026, CSPC Innovation’s revenue rose 40.82% year on year to RMB 664.6 million, while its net loss attributable to shareholders deepened to RMB 93.9 million and operating cash flow turned more negative. Despite largely stable total assets and a modest decline in shareholder equity, profitability metrics deteriorated, suggesting higher investment or cost pressures even as top-line growth accelerates, which may weigh on near-term returns for stakeholders.

The most recent analyst rating on (HK:1093) stock is a Buy with a HK$13.05 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on CSPC Pharmaceutical Group stock, see the HK:1093 Stock Forecast page.

More about CSPC Pharmaceutical Group

CSPC Pharmaceutical Group Limited is a Hong Kong–incorporated pharmaceutical company with operations spanning innovative drug research, development and manufacturing. Through subsidiaries such as CSPC Innovation Pharmaceutical Co., Ltd., it focuses on the Chinese market, including listings on the ChiNext Market of the Shenzhen Stock Exchange, and develops a portfolio of specialty and innovative medicines.

YTD Price Performance: 6.52%

data.title: WW International Announces Term Loan Prepayment and Deleveraging Plan
data.description:
Claim 55% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

WW International, Inc. ( (WW) ) has issued an update.

On April 27, 2026, WW International, Inc. announced plans to use up to $40 million in cash to prepay and reduce the principal on its outstanding term loan, signaling a continued push to deleverage its balance sheet. The move blends a $25 million to $30 million cash sweep due June 24, 2026, with a voluntary solicitation of up to $10 million to repurchase term debt at a discount, with the solicitation expected to run from April 27 to April 30, 2026.

The company reaffirmed its first-quarter 2026 subscriber estimates and full-year 2026 financial guidance, indicating confidence in its operating outlook despite higher first-quarter cash usage tied to peak season marketing. Management framed the debt paydown as evidence of improved liquidity and a strengthened capital structure that should support ongoing investment in its weight health ecosystem and sustainable, profitable growth.

The most recent analyst rating on (WW) stock is a Hold with a $21.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on WW International, Inc. stock, see the WW Stock Forecast page.

Spark’s Take on WW Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, WW is a Neutral.

The score is held down primarily by weak financial fundamentals (negative TTM operating/FCF, thin operating margins, and a historically stressed balance sheet) and strongly bearish technicals (well below key moving averages with negative MACD). This is partially offset by an extremely low reported P/E and a cautiously optimistic earnings outlook driven by clinical product momentum and 2026 EBITDA guidance.

To see Spark’s full report on WW stock, click here.

More about WW International, Inc.

WW International, Inc., known as Weight Watchers, is a global leader in science-backed weight management, offering an integrated weight health ecosystem that blends clinical expertise, medication options including GLP-1 therapies, digital tools and human coaching. With more than six decades of experience, it delivers a holistic, personalized weight-loss program to consumers directly and through employers, health plans and other payers worldwide.

The company is recognized as the most studied commercial weight management program and positions itself as a U.S. doctor-recommended solution built for the GLP-1 era. Its offerings span app-based support, clinical interventions and community-based coaching aimed at sustainable, long-term health outcomes.

Average Trading Volume: 312,852

Technical Sentiment Signal: Strong Sell

Current Market Cap: $92.67M

data.title: Miluna Acquisition to Merge with CADV.AI, Form Kukugan
data.description:
Claim 55% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

Miluna Acquisition Corp. Class A ( (MMTX) ) has provided an announcement.

On April 23, 2026, Miluna Acquisition Corp. signed a definitive business combination agreement with Kukugan Invest and its subsidiary CADV Ventures S.A., under which Kukugan will merge into Miluna and CADV.AI will become a wholly owned subsidiary of the surviving public company. The deal, unanimously approved by all parties’ boards and major stakeholders and expected to close in the second half of 2026, values CADV.AI at a pre-money equity value of $300 million and implies an enterprise value of about $408 million, with CADV.AI shareholders rolling all their equity and retaining leadership of the combined company, to be renamed Kukugan Corp.

Miluna will issue approximately $250 million in Class A shares as consideration and create high-vote, non-economic Class B shares for a designated individual, while CADV.AI shareholders may receive up to 5 million additional shares if the merged group reaches at least $7 million of revenue in 2027. The transaction, which includes customary representations, covenants and closing conditions, leaves room for up to $50 million of additional PIPE or equity line financing, and is designed to give CADV.AI growth capital, a U.S. exchange listing and enhanced acquisition capacity, while SPAC investors face standard approval, redemption, regulatory and delisting risks alongside potential dilution from earn-out and any future financings.

The boards agreed to install a post-merger board including CADV.AI directors, two designees of Miluna’s sponsor and independent members, with CADV.AI chief executive Shang Ju Lin set to continue leading the business. Parent and CADV.AI have waived any claim on Miluna’s trust account, and the parties have signed support agreements, registration rights and lock-up arrangements that underscore strong sponsor and shareholder backing but also outline extensive conditions and termination rights that could derail or delay the listing if approvals, market conditions or exchange requirements are not satisfied.

More about Miluna Acquisition Corp. Class A

CADV Ventures S.A., which operates as CADV.AI, is a Warsaw-based AI software company founded in 2017 that focuses on improving digital customer engagement and providing mission-critical support for large organizations’ IT systems. Its platform uses an AI-assisted support model to analyze incidents, automate operational tasks and deliver an IT protection service package that guarantees access to specialist engineers for complex technical issues.

Miluna Acquisition Corp. is a special purpose acquisition company formed in 2025 to pursue mergers or similar business combinations and raised $69 million in its October 2025 IPO, with its units, ordinary shares and warrants listed on Nasdaq. Miluna’s strategy is to identify high-quality targets with strong management teams, positioning it as a financial sponsor for growth companies seeking access to public capital markets.

Average Trading Volume: 14,627

Technical Sentiment Signal: Strong Buy

Current Market Cap: $88.72M

See more insights into MMTX stock on TipRanks’ Stock Analysis page.

data.title: NexMetals Mining Reports Improved Selkirk Metallurgical Results
data.description:
Claim 55% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

Nexmetals Mining ( (TSE:NEXM) ) has issued an update.

On April 27, 2026, NexMetals Mining reported new metallurgical results from its Selkirk nickel-copper-PGE project in Botswana, confirming that recent locked cycle tests can produce separate, saleable copper and nickel concentrates using large-diameter core from the 2025 drill program. The tests delivered a copper concentrate grading 30.2% Cu at 81.3% recovery with low nickel contamination, and a nickel concentrate grading 10.9% Ni at 54.4% recovery, marking a significant shift away from the project’s historical low-grade bulk concentrate approach.

Compared with assumptions used in the 2024 mineral resource estimate, the latest work shows a 16% increase in copper recovery, more than halved copper losses to tailings, and a roughly 60% improvement in nickel concentrate grade, while maintaining copper concentrate grades near 30%. NexMetals also highlighted that PGEs, gold, cobalt and silver—some of which were not comprehensively assayed previously—are now being integrated into the deposit model, potentially adding meaningful upside to Selkirk’s economics and supporting an upcoming updated mineral resource estimate expected in the second quarter of 2026.

These results further de-risk the processing flowsheet by validating a conventional sequential flotation circuit and suggest improved payability from precious and by-product metals in both concentrates. Management signalled that, following completion of the new resource estimate, the company expects to be better positioned to evaluate strategic options for Selkirk, including partnerships, a possible spin-out or advancing toward new economic studies, with the goal of crystallising greater value for shareholders in a supportive commodity price environment.

The most recent analyst rating on (TSE:NEXM) stock is a Buy with a C$12.50 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Nexmetals Mining stock, see the TSE:NEXM Stock Forecast page.

Spark’s Take on NEXM Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, NEXM is a Neutral.

The score is held down primarily by very weak financial performance (pre-revenue, widening losses, and heavy ongoing cash burn) and bearish technicals (below key moving averages with negative MACD). Positive exploration/board-related corporate events provide some upside optionality, but valuation support is limited due to continued losses and no dividend.

To see Spark’s full report on NEXM stock, click here.

More about Nexmetals Mining

NexMetals Mining Corp. is a Vancouver-based mining company focused on the exploration and development of nickel, copper and platinum group element (PGE) deposits. Its flagship asset is the advanced, past-producing Selkirk Project in Botswana, where historical work centred on open-pit extraction and bulk concentrate production, now being reoriented toward higher-value separate copper and nickel concentrates.

The company is listed on the TSX Venture Exchange and Nasdaq under the symbol NEXM, and targets value creation by upgrading metallurgical performance and resource definition at Selkirk. By reassessing previously underexplored by-product metals such as PGEs, cobalt, silver and gold, NexMetals aims to enhance project economics and reposition Selkirk as a more compelling development opportunity within the global base and precious metals market.

Average Trading Volume: 101,020

Technical Sentiment Signal: Sell

Current Market Cap: C$112.2M

See more insights into NEXM stock on TipRanks’ Stock Analysis page.

An announcement from IAMGOLD ( (TSE:IMG) ) is now available.

IAMGOLD on April 27, 2026 reported the publication of its 2025 Sustainability Report and related ESG performance data, detailing progress on environmental, social and governance practices viewed as material to the business and its stakeholders. The company highlighted advances in its 2030 HSEC Strategy, emphasizing a shift from framework design to on-the-ground execution across safety, water stewardship, biodiversity, energy transition and community engagement, underscoring ESG as central to its operating model and long-term value creation for stakeholders.

The report, which follows global disclosure frameworks including GRI, SASB and TCFD, underscores the role of employees, contractors and partners at its Côté Gold, Westwood and Essakane operations in driving sustainability performance. By aligning with widely recognized reporting standards and showcasing tangible ESG achievements, IAMGOLD is seeking to reinforce its reputation as a responsible mid-tier gold miner, potentially strengthening its position with investors, communities and regulators that increasingly scrutinize mining-sector sustainability credentials.

The company, listed on the NYSE and TSX, also holds a portfolio of early stage and advanced exploration projects such as the large-scale Nelligan Mining Complex in Quebec and employs about 3,700 people, emphasizing accountable mining and strong ESG standards.

data.title: Cordiant Digital Wins Shareholder Backing as It Shifts to New LSE Fund Listing
data.description:
Claim 55% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

The latest update is out from Cordiant Digital Infrastructure Limited ( (GB:CORD) ).

Cordiant Digital Infrastructure Limited, a specialist digital infrastructure investor listed in London, focuses on data centres, fibre networks and telecoms and broadcast towers across Europe and North America. Backed by substantial equity and debt financing, it has built a diversified portfolio of six platforms designed to deliver resilient, often index-linked cash flows alongside long-term growth.

Shareholders at an extraordinary general meeting overwhelmingly approved changes to Cordiant’s investment policy and revised articles of incorporation, with more than 73% of the share capital voting and near-unanimous support for both resolutions. The company has also applied for its entire issued share capital to move into the Closed-ended Investment Fund category of the FCA’s Official List and to continue trading on the London Stock Exchange’s main market, a shift that may refine its regulatory framework and align it more closely with peer investment funds without altering its existing trading identifiers.

Admission to the new listing category is expected to take effect on 30 April 2026, with no change to the company’s ticker, ISIN, SEDOL or LEI. The governance and listing adjustments signal an effort to optimise Cordiant’s structure within the UK listed funds universe, potentially enhancing its appeal to institutional investors seeking specialised exposure to digital infrastructure assets.

The most recent analyst rating on (GB:CORD) stock is a Buy with a £1.35 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Cordiant Digital Infrastructure Limited stock, see the GB:CORD Stock Forecast page.

Spark’s Take on CORD Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, CORD is a Outperform.

Cordiant Digital Infrastructure Limited scores highly due to strong technical indicators and attractive valuation metrics. Corporate events further enhance its outlook with strategic growth and management confidence. However, financial performance is tempered by cash flow challenges, which slightly offset the overall positive assessment.

To see Spark’s full report on CORD stock, click here.

More about Cordiant Digital Infrastructure Limited

Cordiant Digital Infrastructure Limited is a London-listed, sector-focused owner and operator of digital infrastructure assets, including data centres, fibre-optic networks, and telecoms and broadcast towers across Europe and North America. The company has raised £795 million in equity and a €375 million debt package, deploying capital into six acquisitions that provide stable, often index-linked income and growth potential under its Buy, Build & Grow model.

Its portfolio includes CRA, Hudson, Emitel, Speed Fibre, Belgian Tower Company and Datacentre United, positioning Cordiant as a specialist platform in the core infrastructure of the digital economy. The business is managed by Cordiant Capital Inc.’s digital infrastructure team, which combines sector executives and private capital investors and focuses on scaling cash-generative platforms in Europe and North America.

Average Trading Volume: 1,029,086

Technical Sentiment Signal: Buy

For a thorough assessment of CORD stock, go to TipRanks’ Stock Analysis page.

data.title: Costain Sets Scrip Dividend Price for 2025 Final Payout
data.description:
Claim 55% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

Costain ( (GB:COST) ) just unveiled an update.

Costain has set the scrip dividend reference price for its final dividend for the year to 31 December 2025 at 187.36 pence per ordinary share, based on the average mid-market price over five trading days starting from the ex-dividend date of 16 April 2026. Shareholders on the register as of 17 April 2026 can opt to receive new shares instead of cash, with the final dividend, including any scrip elections, scheduled for payment on 26 May 2026, subject to shareholder approval at the 2026 AGM.

The scrip option allows investors to reinvest their dividend directly into Costain shares, potentially supporting the company’s capital base while giving shareholders flexibility over their form of return. Existing scrip mandates remain in force unless cancelled, simplifying participation and underscoring Costain’s continued use of equity-based dividends as part of its broader shareholder remuneration strategy.

The most recent analyst rating on (GB:COST) stock is a Hold with a £180.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Costain stock, see the GB:COST Stock Forecast page.

Spark’s Take on COST Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, COST is a Outperform.

The score is driven primarily by improved financial stability and earnings quality (higher margins, low leverage, solid cash conversion), supported by strong technical uptrend signals. Valuation is reasonable but not deeply compelling, and the key risk tempering the score is the multi-year revenue contraction, which could limit future growth if it persists.

data.title: HBT Financial Posts Q1 Results Highlighting Strong Core Performance
data.description:
Claim 55% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

HBT Financial ( (HBT) ) has provided an update.

HBT Financial, Inc. reported first-quarter 2026 net income of $11.2 million, or $0.34 per diluted share, down from both the prior quarter and a year earlier, but said adjusted net income rose to $22.6 million, or $0.68 per diluted share, reflecting strong underlying performance. The bank posted higher net interest margin, solid asset quality metrics, and a modest quarterly decline but double-digit year-on-year increase in tangible book value per share, while management emphasized robust liquidity and capital to support organic growth and future acquisitions.

On March 1, 2026, HBT Financial completed its acquisition of CNB Bank Shares, Inc. and CNB Bank & Trust, N.A., adding approximately $1.8 billion in assets, $1.3 billion in loans, and $1.5 billion in deposits, and increasing its density in central Illinois and the Chicago and St. Louis MSAs. The $182.1 million transaction, which generated $23.7 million of goodwill and $15.7 million of acquisition-related expenses in the quarter, marks a significant expansion of HBT’s franchise and is expected to enhance its competitive position in key Midwest markets once integration benefits are fully realized.

The most recent analyst rating on (HBT) stock is a Buy with a $30.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on HBT Financial stock, see the HBT Stock Forecast page.

Spark’s Take on HBT Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, HBT is a Outperform.

The score is driven primarily by strong underlying financial performance (profitability, improving leverage, healthy ROE) and supportive valuation (low P/E and ~3.2% yield). Offsetting factors are neutral-to-soft technical momentum (negative MACD, below 50DMA) and some cash-flow volatility, while recent corporate actions are broadly constructive (acquisition integration, dividend raise, Tier 2 capital raise).

To see Spark’s full report on HBT stock, click here.

More about HBT Financial

HBT Financial, Inc. is the Bloomington, Illinois-based holding company for Heartland Bank and Trust Company, operating as a regional banking institution. The company focuses on community and commercial banking services, with a growing presence in central Illinois and the Chicago and St. Louis metropolitan statistical areas, targeting both retail and business customers.
